Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.chzzk.chat

Class SubscriptionMessage

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.chzzk.chat.ChatMessage
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.chzzk.chat.SubscriptionMessage
public class SubscriptionMessage extends ChatMessage
Class representing a subscription message. A chat message that includes subscription information.
Since:
1.0.0
